arts.ttl: Sky Sports Drop Update on Liverpool Move for ‘One of the Best’ Stars
arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong is a man in hot demand across Europe but an update has emerged on his future, potentially ruling out a move to Liverpool

arts.ttl: Southampton Make ‘Elite’ Manager ‘One of the Favourites’ to Replace Martin
arts.sum: Southampton are in need of a new boss after sacking Russell Martin, and reports have stated that a Championship boss is a new name on their shortlist

arts.ttl: West Brom's Corberan under consideration for Southampton job
arts.sum: Southampton are considering West Brom head coach Carlos Corberan as a candidate to be their new manager, along with the former Denmark boss Kasper Hjulmand, and at least one other foreign manager.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's agent has already confirmed he'll earn more than £1m per week if he signs new Liverpool deal
'Incredible' manager told to make one Southampton demand, he's 'inspired by Barcelona' football
Will Southampton and Wolves stay up after changing managers?
arts.sum: Following their difficult starts to the season, Southampton and Wolverhampton Wanderers have dismissed their managers, but how will this impact their chances of staying in the Premier League? When two points were awarded for a win, 30.8 per cent of teams to have started the season as badly as Wolves have done in 2024/25 went on to escape the drop.

arts.ttl: 'Mohamed Salah has signed new Liverpool contract'
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has signed a two-year contract extension at Liverpool, according to Manchester City legend Sergio Aguero. While Aguero claims that Salah has already signed a contract extension at Liverpool, the Egypt international has previously indicated that he is likely to leave Anfield next summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool target Rayan Cherki to remain at Lyon this January
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki (21) is in a rich vein of form currently, however, he may be in his final few months, even weeks, at formative club Olympique Lyonnais. Reports have suggested…

arts.ttl: 'A simpler plan' - Liverpool supporters send Fulham message as Arne Slot 'experimental' claim made
arts.sum: Liverpool supporters have been having their say on the Reds' 2-2 draw with Fulham at Anfield in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool told how much Milos Kerkez would cost as Jamie Carragher urges Arne Slot to sign full-back
arts.sum: Liverpool have been told how much they will need to pay if they want to sign Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez. Jamie Carragher told Liverpool to...
